headline: Inside SpaceX’s IPO Filing: Musk’s Control, xAI Losses, and Anthropic’s Massive AI Deal
summary: SpaceX  long-awaited IPO filing arrived Wednesday afternoon, offering investors their first detailed look at Elon Musk’s rocket and AI empire.  SpaceX is going after what it describes as a $28.5 trillion addressable market “to build the systems and technologies necessary to make life multiplanetary, to understand the true nature of the universe, and to extend the light of consciousness to the stars.”  The IPO is expected to raise a record amount of money, valuing Elon Musk’s company at roughly $2 trillion—enough to turn the world’s richest person into a trillionaire.

headline: NTSB UPS Crash Hearings Put Safety Risks And Valuation In Focus
summary: Federal investigators are holding ongoing NTSB hearings into a UPS cargo jet crash in Louisville. The multi party investigation includes testimony from UPS, Boeing, the FAA, and families of victims. Proceedings are focused on causes of the accident, safety procedures, and oversight of cargo operations. For investors following United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS), the hearings come at a time when the stock trades around $98.87 and has declined 7.7% over the past 30 days and 31.6% over 3 years...

headline: Boeing Bets On Gilat Antennas As Connectivity Becomes Core For Investors
summary: Boeing (NYSE:BA) is partnering with Gilat Satellite Networks to offer the Sidewinder electronically steered antenna as a factory line-fit option on its commercial aircraft. The agreement is focused on simplifying and improving in-flight broadband connectivity for airlines by integrating the antenna directly into new aircraft. The Sidewinder ESA is intended to support higher quality passenger connectivity without the need for costly post-delivery retrofits. For investors watching Boeing...

headline: Musk Has Complete Control of SpaceX, and  4 More Takeaways From the IPO Filing
summary: The S-1 IPO registration statement for Elon Musk’s rocket company SpaceX arrived late Wednesday afternoon.  SpaceX is going after what it describes as a $28.5 trillion addressable market “to build the systems and technologies necessary to make life multiplanetary, to understand the true nature of the universe, and to extend the light of consciousness to the stars.”  The IPO is expected to raise a record amount of money, valuing Elon Musk’s company at roughly $2 trillion—enough to turn the world’s richest person into a trillionaire.

headline: One-Fifth of SpaceX Revenue Comes From Uncle Sam: The Defense Contractors That Should Worry
summary: SpaceX’s S-1 just handed legacy defense investors a number they cannot ignore. And you can bet they won’t. headline: Xi wants China to be seen as a global indispensable power: Expert
summary: Evan Medeiros, professor of Asia studies at Georgetown University, said Beijing's back-to-back hosting of Trump and Putin in the same week signals that China has options and leverage with everyone. However, both summits were thin on real deliverables despite the pageantry. There was no breakthrough on the Power of Siberia 2 pipeline — what Medeiros called "the golden chalice" that Putin has yet to secure.
